messages.text: Just got my first meshcore device setup yesterday! Hope to get more signal near the jackson area.

messages.author: RadioJones
messages.text: Just wanted to encourage you to keep looking, and working to make your node the best it can be. There will be a lot of new people joining us in the near future. Invite friends, family and everyone you meet to get into the mesh. Put your antenna as high as possible and try more places, especially higher elevations. I got a 6 hop contact from Canada this morning and I am in Southern California! All things are possible for those who believe
messages.content_html: Just wanted to encourage you to keep looking, and working to make your node the best it can be. There will be a lot of new people joining us in the near future. messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: the meshcore dev team have moved to a new discord server. details and reasons are here: https://blog.meshcore.io/2026/04/23/the-split Please create a new thread for your region in the https://discord.com/channels/1495203904898728149/1495412453150818585 for your region on the new meshcore.io discord server. https://meshcore.gg
